name: setFilePath
title: setFilePath
description: This function sets the read and write path to the directory. The path can be given as absolute or relative to the currently active configuration.

parameters.description: Sets path for write functions (same as setWritePath)
Sets path for both types of functions

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
